subject: An exhausted inventor collapsed face-down on a workbench, surrounded by mechanical components and a magnifying lens
description: A bearded man with disheveled hair lies face-down on a wooden workbench, slumped over in apparent exhaustion or mental collapse. Around him are scattered the tools of an inventor's trade: a large brass magnifying lens or loupe on a stand, gears, mechanical parts, and what appear to be design schematics or papers. The scene is rendered in muted earthy browns and warm sepia tones, with soft directional lighting falling across the figure's hair and shoulder. The composition is intimate and close-cropped, conveying the burden of creative pressure crushing the inventor under the weight of his own ambition.
foreground: Collapsed inventor slumped over workbench with brass magnifying lens and scattered tools
background: Indistinct workshop interior in soft-focus warm browns
